expectations.text: Creates exactly one TeamCreate with tfx- prefix naming
Spawns 3 Agent wrappers with mode: bypassPermissions

expectations.text: Uses tfx-route.sh inside Agent wrapper (not direct codex/gemini)
expectations.evidence: Direct codex exec / gemini -y -p explicitly prohibited
TeamDelete mandatory, 30s wait, force cleanup fallback
